blockers.title: Public outreach requires approval
blockers.detail: No Reddit comments, modmail, DMs, emails, social posts, or paid ads should be sent without exact destination and content approval.

blockers.title: Subreddit rules must be checked live
blockers.detail: Each Reddit draft needs a final rule and unresolved-status check before posting. Use the no-platform variant unless product mentions are clearly allowed.

blockers.title: No verified acquired posters yet
blockers.detail: A person counts as acquired only after creating a real request on pleasefindmethis.com. Current verified count is 0.

nextActions: Approve or reject the 32 drafts in marketing/poster_acquisition_direct_batch_01.md, marketing/poster_acquisition_direct_batch_02.md, and marketing/poster_acquisition_direct_batch_03.md.
After approval, send only 3-8 highest-quality helpful comments first and log each URL/timestamp.
Approve or reject the two owned founder posts in marketing/poster_acquisition_outreach_queue.md.
Update marketing/poster_acquisition_pipeline_100.csv only when a touch, reply, click, signup, or request creation actually happens.
Keep paid traffic off until checkout and acquisition tracking are verified end to end.
